name: sureclaw-voice
description: SureClaw Voice — OpenClaw plugin that serves the browser voice PWA and mints browser WebRTC realtime sessions from the configured realtime voice config.

scripts.build: pnpm run build:app && pnpm run build:plugin
scripts.build:app: pnpm --filter openclaw-voice-pwa build && rm -rf webapp && cp -R app/dist webapp
